summary: Gemma Gem is an AI model embedded in a browser with no API keys or cloud requirements, but it has significant installation issues and lacks a strong community. It has some relevance to the current LLM ecosystem as an ai-powered-broker.

github.description: Gemma Gem runs Google's Gemma 4 model entirely on-device via WebGPU — no API keys, no cloud, no data leaving your machine.
